# Artificial intelligence (AI) tests

Mercer | Mettl’s artificial intelligence (AI) tests are designed to help you hire candidates with the right technical skills and expertise. The AI assessments suite enables you to hire AI engineers, machine learning engineers, machine learning engineers with experience in Python, and Generative AI engineers. These assessments also help measure competency in TensorFlow using Python and AI learning agility, delivering precise insights, and aiding in building a formidable AI team.
